variants.hook:
Hi {{FirstName}}, quick thought.

Most founders and ops leaders I talk to aren't short on ideas. They're short on time: stuck in follow-ups, reporting, and busywork that shouldn't need them.

I build AI automation systems that take that off your plate: lead handling, internal workflows, chatbots, and custom agents.

Curious: what's one repetitive task you wish just ran itself?
variants.founder:
Hi {{FirstName}}, quick thought.

Most founders I talk to aren't short on ideas. They're short on time: stuck in follow-ups, reporting, and ops that shouldn't need them.

I build AI automation systems that take that off your plate: lead handling, internal workflows, chatbots, and custom agents.

What's one process in your business that still depends on you doing it manually every day?
variants.ops:
Hi {{FirstName}}, hope you're well.

Ops teams usually lose the most time to the same loops: handoffs, status updates, lead routing, reporting, and support triage.

I help companies automate those with AI + n8n / Make / Zapier, so teams spend less time copying data and more time closing work.

Which workflow eats the most hours on your team right now: leads, reporting, onboarding, or support?
variants.short:
Hi {{FirstName}}, saw we're connected and thought I'd reach out properly.

I help companies set up AI automation: lead handling, chatbots, and internal workflows, so teams save 10 to 20 hours/week.

Worth a quick look if that's on your radar? Happy to send 2 to 3 examples.
